_comment: SHARED mapping: input (Dreame action-trigger events) => output (GameCube-pad ops, Dolphin Pipe names). Convention <source>-to-<target>.mapping.json, loaded via controller.load_mapping('dreame-to-gamecube'). INTENT: open-world 'just move' (e.g. Wind Waker) -- the vacuum's route becomes the character's walk, so locomotion is the WHOLE mapping: heading -> analog stick, nothing else. The capture layer emits turn/reposition/battery/pet; turn/reposition stay unbound (a turn is just the stick pointing somewhere new), but pet -> a quick A press, so the character reacts when the clean detected a pet (placed at the route midpoint, since the data is a per-clean boolean). A more button-heavy game would be a different mapping over the same events.
